# SabahWebs

> Professional web design and SEO services in Sabah, Malaysia (based in Kota Kinabalu). We build fast, responsive websites that rank on Google.

SabahWebs (Happy Codes) helps Sabah businesses get online and get found. Services cover web design/development, search engine optimization (SEO), and AI SEO (visibility on ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews). Serving Kota Kinabalu and the wider Sabah, Malaysia region.

## Services
- Web design & development — responsive, fast-loading, Google-friendly websites
- SEO — search engine optimization to grow organic traffic
- AI SEO — getting found on ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews and other AI search

## Key pages
- [Home](https://sabahwebs.com/): services, work, FAQ, and contact form
- [Blog](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/): guides on web design, SEO, and doing business/tourism in Sabah

## Blog posts
- [How Much Does SEO Cost in Malaysia? (2026 Honest Pricing)](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/how-much-does-seo-cost-in-malaysia.html): Wondering how much SEO costs in Malaysia? We break down real pricing, what you get at each budget, and what to watch out for before hiring an SEO agency.
- [How Long Does SEO Take to Work? (The Honest Answer)](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/how-long-does-seo-take-to-work-the-honest-answer.html): Most SEO agencies won't give you a straight answer. We will. Here is a realistic timeline of what to expect when you invest in SEO for your business.
- [AI SEO Malaysia: How to Get Your Business Found on ChatGPT and Google AI](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/ai-seo-malaysia.html): AI search is changing how Malaysians find businesses online. Here is what you need to do now to make sure your business shows up on ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Mode.
- [Why Your Sabah Business Needs a Website in 2026](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/why-your-sabah-business-needs-a-website-in-2026.html): Still running your Sabah business on Facebook only? Here is why a professional website is the smartest investment you can make in 2026. Read more.
- [What is Orou Sapulot? A Complete Guide for First-Time Visitors](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/what-is-orou-sapulot.html): Everything you need to know about Orou Sapulot in Sabah, Borneo. From what it is, who founded it, what to do, what to pack and how to get there.
- [Why Orou Sapulot is the Most Important Tourism Project in Sabah Right Now](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/why-orou-sapulot-is-the-most-important.html): Orou Sapulot is not just a travel destination. It is a movement to preserve Murut culture and Borneo's rainforest. Here is why it matters more than ever in 2026.
- [Orou Sapulot: Sabah's Best Kept Secret for Eco-Travellers](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/orou-sapulot-sabahs-best-kept-secret-for-eco-travellers.html): Discover Orou Sapulot, a hidden gem in Sabah run by the original Murut founders. Caves, river rapids, rainforest and authentic culture deep in Borneo.
- [Top 5 Reasons to Visit Orou Sapulot in 2026](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/top-5-reasons-to-visit-orou-sapulot-in-2026.html): From wild rainforest adventures to authentic Murut culture, here are 5 compelling reasons why Orou Sapulot in Sabah should be on your travel list in 2026.
- [The Best Scaffolding in Kota Kinabalu (KK) & Sabah — Why Contractors Trust ProSteel Sdn Bhd](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/the-best-scaffolding-in-kota-kinabalu-kk.html): Need scaffolding in Kota Kinabalu or Sabah? ProSteel Sdn Bhd offers scaffolding rental, sales & buyback across KK and Sabah. Call 088-411 233 for a fast quote.
- [24-Hour Clinic Near Jalan Penampang, Kota Kinabalu — Permai Polyclinics Fortuna](https://sabahwebs.com/blog/24-hour-clinic-jalan-penampang-kota-kinabalu.html): Permai Polyclinics Fortuna: a 24-hour walk-in clinic at Jalan Penampang, Kota Kinabalu. Consultation, vaccination and health screening, no appointment needed.
